codeReview.summary: The commit preserves the required setup-flow behaviors: auto-setup short-circuit ordering remains intact, GitHub-free openpgp success now renders the expected short GPG identity label, auto-detected username status now survives discovery back-navigation, and added tests cover the specified username/discovery boundary paths without introducing regressions.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, mission AGENTS/services/library, and worker skill. No blocking or non-blocking defects were found for this feature; behavior and coverage are consistent with the feature description and expectedBehavior list.
